character.name: A top-down, slightly isometric view of a classic Knight character from a 2D pixel art Survivor-style game. The Knight is a small, 32x32 pixel sprite with a cheerful expression, wearing Shiny plate armor, armet helmet with plume, and wielding a sword in one hand
